detectors.description:
MankichInu.sendETHToFee(uint256) (MankichInu.sol#805-811) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (MankichInu.sol#807)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (MankichInu.sol#809)

[MankichInu.sendETHToFee(uint256)](MankichInu.sol#L805-L811) sends eth to arbitrary user

	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](MankichInu.sol#L809)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MankichInu.openTrading() (MankichInu.sol#409-461):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (MankichInu.sol#423-425)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MankichInu.sol#427-443)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MankichInu.sol#427-443)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (MankichInu.sol#451)
	MankichInu.tradingOpen (MankichInu.sol#363) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MankichInu.openTrading() (MankichInu.sol#409-461)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MankichInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MankichInu.sol#671-773):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (MankichInu.sol#745)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MankichInu.sol#787-799)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (MankichInu.sol#751)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (MankichInu.sol#807)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (MankichInu.sol#809)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MankichInu.sol#771)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (MankichInu.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (MankichInu.sol#911)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (MankichInu.sol#913)
	MankichInu._rOwned (MankichInu.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MankichInu._takeTeam(uint256) (MankichInu.sol#925-933)
	- MankichInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (MankichInu.sol#885-921)
	- MankichInu.balanceOf(address) (MankichInu.sol#497-501)
	- MankichInu.constructor(address,address) (MankichInu.sol#389-407)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MankichInu.sol#771)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (MankichInu.sol#939)
	MankichInu._rTotal (MankichInu.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MankichInu._getCurrentSupply() (MankichInu.sol#1081-1091)
	- MankichInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (MankichInu.sol#937-943)
	- MankichInu.constructor(address,address) (MankichInu.sol#389-407)
	- MankichInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (MankichInu.sol#601-623)
